item.title: US lawmakers set to vote on war powers as Iran conflict widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 4 - Lawmakers in the U.S. Senate were set to begin voting on Wednesday on a bipartisan war powers resolution aiming to stop the military campaign against Iran and require that any hostilities against it be authorized by Congress.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Why Washington can’t stop Trump on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Trump has launched strikes on Iran while Congress debates war powers.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US Senate likely to reject bid to curb Trump's Iran war powers
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The US Senate will vote on a resolution to limit US President Donald Trump’s power to strike Iran, but it is expected to fail due to strong Republican support.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US sinks Iranian warship far from Gulf, NATO destroys Iranian missile heading for Turkey
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The US–Iran war widened sharply on March 4, to NATO member Turkey and Sri Lanka.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Spain denies White House claim it agreed to cooperate with US military
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Spain reiterates its opposition to war on Iran despite Trump's threat of cutting off trade with the European country.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US Dems say Iran troop deployment ‘more likely’ ahead of war powers vote
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Resolution aims to constrain Trump’s war capabilities, but faces uphill battle with veto likely if passed by Congress.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Gulf shipping crisis deepens as tankers stranded for fifth day, US sinks Iranian warship
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 4 - The U.S.–Iran war widened on Wednesday after a U.S. strike hit an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka, deepening a crisis that has paralysed shipping through the Strait of Hormuz for a fifth day and choked off vital Middle East oil and gas flows.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Spain has agreed to cooperate with US military over Iran, says White House
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
US President Donald Trump had threatened to cut trade with Madrid over its Iran war stance.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump Justice Department aims to limit ethics probes into its lawyers
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hungary foreign minister says Russia will free two ethnic Hungarian prisoners of war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BUDAPEST, March 4 - Two ethnic Hungarian prisoners of war will be freed by Russia, Hungary's Foreign Minister Peter Szijjarto said on Wednesday in a statement after meeting with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Moscow.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hardline cleric Arafi joins wartime leadership as Iran juggles conflict, succession
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
DUBAI, March 4 - Ayatollah Alireza Arafi has emerged as a central figure in Iran’s power structure at a moment of unprecedented turmoil, propelled into a leadership role from the ranks of top clerics after the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iranian government making case for demise with indiscriminate attacks, EU’s Kallas says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WARSAW, March 4 - Iran's government is making a strong case for its demise by indiscriminately attacking its neighbours, EU's top diplomat Kaja Kallas told reporters on Wednesday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UK MP’s husband among three accused of spying for China
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Mr David Taylor is the husband of a lawmaker in Britain’s ruling Labour Party.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Turkey has prepared plans for possible migrant flow from Iran, minister says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ISTANBUL, March 4 - Turkey has drawn up plans to deal with a potential inflow of people fleeing the war in neighbouring Iran, Interior Minister Mustafa Ciftci said on Wednesday, with preparations including possible buffer zones along the frontier and tent camps.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran intelligence operatives signalled openness to talks with CIA to end war, NYT reports
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The offer was made through an unnamed country’s spy agency, the NYT said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Landslide kills over 200 people at Congo's Rubaya mine, mines ministry says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
KINSHASA, March 4 - More than 200 people died on Tuesday in a landslide triggered by heavy rains at the Rubaya coltan mine in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo, the country's mines ministry said on Wednesday.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, a contender for Iran’s leadership amid war?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Mojtaba Khamenei emerges as potential successor after death of his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, in US-Israel attacks.
Matched: war(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Medical Student, 23, Had His Symptoms Dismissed by Doctors 50 Times. Now He Has Incurable Brain Cancer
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: ai(+3), cancer(+2)

item.title: Mexico court orders army to hand in missing documents on students that disappeared
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MEXICO CITY, March 4 - A Mexican court ordered the army to hand over long-awaited documents that could advance the landmark investigation into the 2014 disappearance of 43 students in southern Guerrero state at the alleged hands of organized crime and local security forces.
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Russian LNG tanker sinks in Mediterranean, Moscow blames Ukrainian drones
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MOSCOW, March 4 - A Russian tanker carrying liquefied natural gas (LNG) sank in the Mediterranean on Wednesday after what Moscow described as an attack by Ukrainian drones launched from Libya.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US Treasury chief says 15% global tariff likely implemented this week
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
US Treasury chief Scott Bessent said Donald Trump is expected to raise the new global tariff to 15 per cent this week, following a ruling by the Supreme Court of the United States that struck down his earlier country-specific tariffs.
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US kills Iranian leader of Trump assassination plot, Pentagon says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The target, however, was not the initial focus of the war, says US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Ukraine's military drone guru says the next phase of Russia's Shahed war will be all about new extreme speeds
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
